\tzpentry{ID3708}{Quantum Density Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3708 introduces Quantum Density Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho_{\mathrm{eff}}(r) = -\frac{\hbar c \pi^2}{240 \, d^4} \bigg[1 - \frac{d^2}{r^2}\bigg], \end{equation}
